name: Snow Rothschild Acquisition Corp.
business: We are a newly incorporated blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company, formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. We have not identified any potential target for our initial business combination. We intend to capitalize on the extensive experience and vast relationships of our founders to identify, acquire and steward a business.

exposures.sentence: We intend to focus on opportunities in multiple industries, but will focus on industries where our management team has extensive experience that we believe exhibit favorable long -term growth prospects, predictable revenue and stable margins. These include, but are not limited to, companies in the industrial, manufacturing and chemicals sectors.
